subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Every deed of life is a thought expressing itself in action; it is the actual mirror of the man within. The act sets up a force which is the spirit of the deed.
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
